analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet promotes the EU’s Counter-Terrorism Agenda and broader Security Union efforts, arguing that coordinated, cross-border law enforcement and building tolerant societies will make citizens safer and reduce extremism. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – Not explicitly about history or past achievements; it’s forward-looking policy, so no. EU2 (EU is united) – Implies cross-border cooperation but does not emphasize unity among member states or agreement; focus is on policy agenda rather than demonstrable unity, so weak/insufficient. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens) – Yes. It highlights concrete EU measures (Counter-Terrorism Agenda) to anticipate, prevent, protect, and respond to terrorism within the EU, addressing citizens’ safety concerns and showing practical action. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – Partially suggests proactive approach, but not framed as pioneering/leading; mainly operational security policy, so no. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – Focus is internal security and tolerance, not global rights leadership; no. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – Scope is internal EU security, not global cooperation; no. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3.
